banner.offline_body: You can register sales, clinic, services, inventory, prescriptions, vaccinations and locations; they will sync when you're back online.
banner.sync_body: Offline data is waiting to upload to the server.

sync_center.title: Sync queue
sync_center.description: Records saved on this device waiting to upload to the server.
sync_center.offline_hint: You can review the queue offline. Sync requires an internet connection.
sync_center.unsupported_body: Your browser does not support IndexedDB. Offline mode is not available on this device.
sync_center.empty_body: No pending records. Successfully synced changes are removed from the local queue.
sync_center.synced_note: Successfully synced records disappear from this list.
sync_center.discard_confirm: Discard {{label}}? The local record will be lost and will not upload to the server.

toast.offline_body: Connect to the internet to sync.
toast.busy_body: Wait for the current operation to finish.
toast.discarded_body: The record was removed from the local queue.

link.offline_only_body: This section requires internet. Register, Clinic, Services, Inventory, Billing (read-only), Communications, Reports and Settings remain available offline.
link.cache_miss_body: Open this screen at least once online to use it offline.
